tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Eb7sus[/ch] (x2) [ch]Absus[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]EbMaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Eb7[/ch]
        Darlin I, I can't explain, where did we lose our way,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
    girl, it’s drivin’ me insane[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]
    And I know I just need one more chance[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]EbMaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Eb7[/ch]
    to prove my love to you, if you come back to me,[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
    I guarantee that I'll never let you go.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Bbm7[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch]               [ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Abm[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back the way they used to be?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Ab7/Bb[/ch]
Oh God, give me a reason I'm down on bended knee.[/tab]

[Post-chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Dbm7[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch]     [ch]Eb7sus[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
    mmmmm      yeah  I'll never walk again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]        [ch]Dbm7[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
until ya come back to me[/tab]

[tab][ch]Eb7sus[/ch]             [ch]Absus[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm down on bended knee[/tab]

([ch]Ab[/ch]) [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]      ([ch]Eb[/ch])                 [ch]EbMaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Eb7[/ch]
         So many nights I dream of you, holding my pillow tight,[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
    I know that I don't need to be alone.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]EbMaj7[/ch]
    When I open up my eyes to face reality,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Eb7[/ch]
    every moment without you seems like eternity,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]                     [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
    I'm begging you, begging you  come back to me![/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Bbm7[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch]               [ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Abm[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back the way they used to be?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Ab7/Bb[/ch]
Oh God, give me a reason I'm down on bended knee.[/tab]

[Post-chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Dbm7[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch]     [ch]Eb7sus[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
                       I'll never walk again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]        [ch]Dbm7[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
until ya come back to me (until ya come back to me)[/tab]

[tab][ch]Eb7sus[/ch]             [ch]Absus[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm down on bended knee[/tab]

([ch]Ab[/ch]) [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]                     ([ch]Eb[/ch])
   (spoken: )       Baby, I’m sorry,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]EbMaj7[/ch]
    please forgive me for all the wrong I’ve done[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb7[/ch]
    Please come back home girl, I know you put all your trust in me,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ab[/ch]                        [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
    I’m sorry, I let you down, please, forgive me![/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]                  [ch]Cm[/ch]                  [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]
    (sung: ) Gonna swallow my pride, say I'm sorry,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]AbMaj7[/ch]                        [ch]Fm7[/ch]       [ch]G7#5[/ch]
    stop pointing fingers, the blame is on me.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm[/ch]                    [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]
    I want a new life, and I want it with you,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]AbMaj7[/ch]              [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]G7#5[/ch]
    if you feel the same, don't ever let it go.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cm[/ch]                  [ch]G7/B[/ch]
    You gotta believe in the spirit of love,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]                [ch]Adim[/ch]
    it can heal all things, we won't hurt anymore.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
    No I don't believe our love's terminal,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm9[/ch]       [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
    I'm down on my knees,[/tab]

    (song moves up half a step here)
[tab]   [ch]A/B[/ch]
    begging you please[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A/B[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A/B[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back the way they used to be?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]A/B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Oh God, give me a reason I'm down on bended knee.[/tab]

And if you like...

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Esus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
